content.content: The user just said "Hi". Let me check if there are any existing todos from a prior session.

content.text: Hi! How can I help you today?

steps.title: Rewrite CSS — new minimal design system
steps.description: Rewrite the entire CSS file with new design tokens, light/dark theme support via CSS variables, card-style row layout, cleaner spacing, and responsive design. Remove old flat-table-heavy styles.

steps.title: Rewrite XML action template
steps.description: Redesign the XML template: single-row header with search + selectors, compact filter bar with integrated stats, and clean card-like table rows. Move partner inputs to the bottom action bar.

steps.title: Rewrite XML table template
steps.description: Update table XML to use card-style rows: product name prominent, qty details inline, incoming/reorder as secondary info. Keep all data fields and quotation inputs.

steps.title: Update filters JS — add icon config
steps.description: Update filters config with icons. Keep debounce/formatQty helpers. No structural changes needed.

steps.title: Update action JS — keep all features, adjust for new template
steps.description: Keep all existing logic (warehouse, location, search, filter, selection, partner, quotation, theme toggle). Only adjust to match new template structure.

steps.title: Update table JS — keep Row component logic
steps.description: Keep Row component logic (formatQty, availableClass, onQtyInput, onPriceInput, onQtyFocus). Adjust props/table component if template changed.
